creator: trialero@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #36)

TNX Nicolas for your explanation on ports and poudriere, but most of all for fixing this issue! having some overlooked 'corner cases' is just how things work, but saying 'sorry' and fixing it is something proprietary systems can learn from! 

I will dive into the world of ports to learn to keep learning this wonderful system of FreeBSD.

foremost for me this issue is yet a Great Example of the way FOSS works, in that maintainers and end users have contact to improve the system!

Kind Regards,

//meine
